name: Kotak Infinite Credit Card

domestic: 16 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year (max 4 per quarter).

milestones.label: 800 Reward Points (worth ₹800) credited free every month

additionalBenefits: Personalized card design featuring a handcrafted illustration of the cardholder
2 complimentary rounds of golf per month, plus 2 complimentary guest rounds per quarter
Premium concierge assistance (hotel/dining bookings, travel ticketing, event planning)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹4,000 (max ₹4,500 per calendar year)

salaried: Exclusively for Kotak Wealth Management Banking Relationship clients
selfEmployed: Exclusively for Kotak Wealth Management Banking Relationship clients

internalNotes: Invite-only credit card for Wealth Management clients. Every 1 Reward Point converts to 2 Air Miles for partner travel redemptions. Foreign markup fee is reduced to 2%. Spends on wallet, fuel, rent, insurance, utilities, education, government, and gaming do not earn reward points.
